title: Subjugator (disambiguation)
content:
'''Subjugator''' could refer to several things:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''''[[Subjugator (Star Destroyer)|Subjugator]]''''', a [[Star Destroyer]] in the [[Imperial Navy]].
*'''''[[Subjugator (Resurgent-class)|Subjugator]]''''', a [[Resurgent-class Star Destroyer|''Resurgent''-class Star Destroyer]] in the [[First Order]].
*'''[[Subjugator-class heavy cruiser|''Subjugator''-class heavy cruiser]]''', a class of [[heavy cruiser]].

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''''[[Subjugator (Imperial II-class)|Subjugator]]''''', an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]].
*'''''[[Subjugator (Victory-class)|Subjugator]]''''', a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]].
*'''''[[Subjugator (Nebulon-B2 frigate)|Subjugator]]''''', a [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]].
*'''[[Subjugator-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Subjugator''-class heavy cruiser]]''', a class of [[Heavy cruiser/Legends|heavy cruiser]].
**'''''[[Subjugator (Subjugator-class)|Subjugator]]''''', a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] ''Subjugator''-class heavy cruiser.
